TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Baron Waqa = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 12 jiyax 31 ka Baron Waqa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nauru ta sayang o kiya ka Baron Waqa, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 6 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = baɾon waqa = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka baɾon waqa ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nauɾu ta sajaŋ o kija ka baɾon waqa, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Baron Waqa = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 12 jiyax 31 ka Baron Waqa ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nauru ta sayang o kiya ka Baron Waqa, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 6 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = baɾon waqa = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka baɾon waqa ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nauɾu ta sajaŋ o kija ka baɾon waqa, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
